have h : ∀ n : ℕ+, f n = n ↔ (∀ k : ℕ, (n.digits 2).reverse.get? k = some 0 ∨ (n.digits 2).reverse.get? k = some 1) ∧ (n.digits 2).reverse = (n.digits 2) := by
    · intro n
      induction' n using Nat+.strong_induction_on with n ih
      cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n with n
        · simp_all
        · cases' n % 2 with r
          · have h₁ : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
            rw [h₁, h₂]
            simp_all
          · cases' n % 4 with r
            · have h₁ : n = 4 * (n / 4) := by omega
              rw [h₁, h₂]
              simp_all
            · cases' r with r
              · have h₁ : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
                rw [h₁, h₃]
                simp_all
                <;> try apply ih
                <;> omega
              · have h₁ : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
                rw [h₁, h₄]
                simp_all
                <;> try apply ih
                <;> omega
  simp_all
  decide
